channel.title: Posts on SPRING 2020-2021
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on SPRING 2020-2021

item.title: Welcome
item.description: Dear all, 📢 You will find useful links and lecture notes here on this blog, built for Hacettepe University Mining Engineering Spring 2020-2021 lectures given by me. You can navigate through the “Tags” that are attached to each post in corresponding dates for upcoming lectures. Good luck, ☀️ GERTUNC
